source.title: Staff Site Reliability Engineer
source.content_text:
Staff Site Reliability Engineer
Location: Brisbane, QLD
Company: Signal Ops

We need a Staff Site Reliability Engineer to improve reliability for customer-facing services on GCP. You will operate Kubernetes platforms, define SLOs and SLIs, and strengthen observability with Prometheus. Strong Go experience is preferred for automation and incident tooling.
